## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "scripts\WorkspaceManager.ps1"`
2. Select option '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste error output to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- PowerShell version (`pwsh --version`):
- VS Code version (`code --version`):
- Git version (`git --version`):

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
